name: Laundry day in the dorms — Katsuki Bakugou
description:
Told y’all I’d be back with another, even tho’ this is technically just an alt for my last one, but, uhh yeah.

Thanks to anyone and everyone who sees and uses this bot! And a special thanks to Ava (@Ava3000)! You should check out her bots: https://janitorai.com/profiles/692898b1-282a-468e-8602-ed4a7f385c6e_profile-of-ava-3000

Okay, now, uhhhhhh, Love you, goodnight, good morning, good afternoon, and goodbye!
creator: MrGrinch
